summary: RK Overseas is a home appliances store web application. The project will feature product listings, categories, and store functionality for an overseas home appliances retailer.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide hero banner showing modern home appliances (refrigerator, washing machine, air conditioner) arranged on a clean background with warm amber lighting and a premium showroom feel (hero-banner.dim_1440x500.png)
- Store logo mark — bold stylized letters 'RK' in amber/gold on a deep charcoal circular badge with a subtle appliance icon element (rk-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Decorative category tile background — abstract geometric pattern in charcoal and amber tones, suitable as a card background for appliance categories (category-bg.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Build a multi-page frontend for the RK Overseas Home Appliances Store with the following pages: (1) Home/Landing page with hero banner, featured products, and store highlights; (2) Products/Shop page with category filtering, search, and product grid; (3) Product Detail page with full description, price, availability, brand/model info, and an inquiry button; (4) Categories page listing all appliance categories; (5) Contact/Inquiry page with a form for customer inquiries (name, email, phone, message, optional product reference); (6) About page with store information. Include a persistent navbar with the RK Overseas logo/name, navigation links, and a footer with contact details.

Apply a cohesive visual theme to the entire frontend: use a warm, professional palette centered on deep charcoal, crisp white, and a bold amber/gold accent color. Use clean sans-serif typography, card-based product layouts with subtle shadows, and a modern e-commerce aesthetic that conveys reliability and premium quality for an international home appliances retailer. Enforce the theme consistently across all pages, components, and interactive states.

Generate and display static image assets for the store: a hero banner image for the home page and a store logo. Render these from frontend/public/assets/generated. Use placeholder product images from a consistent visual style for product cards where no specific image is provided.

new_feature_requests.summary: Home appliances product catalog with categories and listings
Store/shop page with product details and browsing

Create a backend data model and actor for the home appliances store, including: Product (id, name, description, price, category, imageUrl, inStock, brand, model), Category (id, name, description), and Inquiry (id, name, email, phone, message, productId, timestamp). Implement CRUD operations for products and categories, and an addInquiry function.

Seed the backend with realistic sample data: at least 5 product categories (e.g., Kitchen Appliances, Washing Machines, Air Conditioners, Refrigerators, Small Appliances) and at least 12 sample products spread across categories, with realistic brand names, model numbers, prices, and descriptions relevant to overseas home appliances retail.
